t_tag:
Where people and agents build in tune.
Tutti brings your agents into one live workspace with shared context, files, apps, and running tasks.
t_i1: <bold>No terminal needed, easy to start. Consistent experience across agents.</bold>
t_agent_gui_unconnected_alt: Agent window before connecting a local agent
t_h2: See how agents collaborate with Big @
t_atdesc: Type @ in a conversation to let agents access each other's <bold>chats, files, and tasks</bold> with full context — or call an app directly.
t_atd1: @ another agent to share conversation context
t_atd2: @ a file for the agent to read directly
t_atd3: @ a task to give the agent task context
t_atd4: @ an app to let the agent use it
t_appdesc: Built-in productivity apps, ready to go. <info><bold>Powered by your existing subscriptions</bold> <dot>i</dot><tip>Available capabilities depend on your Agent / model subscriptions</tip></info>
t_agappdesc: Agents can @ apps directly in conversations, and use app outputs to keep working. <bold>No manual transfers.</bold>
t_agd1: Agent @ an app in conversation to get things done
t_agd2: Agent picks up app outputs and keeps working
t_h4: From goal to done, fully in control
t_h4_desc: Set the goal, agents break it down and execute — fully visible, nothing slips.
t_tc_img1: Agent auto-decomposes into subtasks and executes
t_tc_img2: Dashboard · filter by priority or agent
t_h5_desc: Keep multiple windows organized with quick activation and one-click layout
t_window_layout_alt: Window auto layout: quick activation and arrangement
t_end: People and agents, building in tune
